operational_flow_summary: Human enters explicit local request or pasted semantic proposal.
Governed demo flow creates in-memory continuity artifacts.
Replay, lifecycle, lineage, semantic, authority, and continuity artifacts render in the read-only cockpit.
Explicit replay loading renders current in-memory session entries.

architecture_layer_map.human_operator: explicit local input and semantic proposal JSON
architecture_layer_map.chatgpt_llm_semantic_cognition: may produce semantic proposals outside runtime; imported manually
architecture_layer_map.aigol_agol_governance_cockpit: validates admissible semantic direction and renders continuity visibility
architecture_layer_map.pure_governance_primitives: envelope validation, validator composition, continuity report synthesis
architecture_layer_map.browser_companion_sidepanel: read-only operational UX and active-session observability surface
architecture_layer_map.replay_session_layer: bounded in-memory append-only visibility for active sidepanel session
architecture_layer_map.execution_provider_layer: not invoked by the demo environment

coherence_assessment.reason: The current environment demonstrates governed continuity, observability, and authority labels without creating execution authority.

duplicate_concepts_or_naming_drift: replay timeline vs replay session vs replay summary artifact
lifecycle view vs lifecycle summary artifact
semantic direction view vs semantic proposal artifact
continuity status vs continuity report artifact

risks.description: Sidepanel density may reduce operator comprehension.
Provider dispatch could blur observability and authority if added before UX consolidation.
Durable replay backend work could introduce hidden persistence risks unless separately specified and reviewed.
ChatGPT API integration could blur human-mediated semantics unless kept as a separate governance milestone.
Duplicate replay/lifecycle/semantic panels could cause naming drift if not normalized.
